title: LightCycler 480 SYBR Green I qPCR
description: Roche SYBR Green I 20 uL qPCR: 95 C pre-incubation, 45 cycles, full melt-curve and cooling program.

steps.name: Annealing (set ~5 C below primer Tm; 60 C typical)

payload.notes: SYBR Green I chemistry; run the melt-curve program above (95 C 5 sec, 65 C 1 min, then a continuous-acquisition ramp to 97 C at ~0.11 C/sec, 5-10 acquisitions per C) to confirm specificity, then cool to 40 C. Roche pools the forward and reverse primers into a single 10X mix; primers 0.2-1 uM final each (recommended start 0.5 uM each). Annealing temperature is primer-dependent (set ~5 C below the calculated Tm; 60 C is a common starting point). The extension hold equals amplicon length / 25 (for example ~20 sec for a 500 bp product). Up to 50-100 ng genomic DNA per reaction. 45 cycles suit most assays; 40 suffice for optimized assays. Values shown are for the 96-well block. Source: Roche LightCycler 480 SYBR Green I Master pack insert (Cat. 04707516001), https://lifescience.roche.com/global/en/products/others/lightcycler-480-sybr-green-i-master-358112.html
